title: Requesting Contract Review
body:
Hi [Name],  

Thanks for getting in touch! We are keen to get started on this.  

We just need a few basic details from you so we can process your request quickly. It only takes a couple of minutes:  

https://forms.cloud.microsoft/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=hHy2RUCWlEyluM_0-POJOjbxK1HcPvJNl71AAD6N2AhUQUpVUjFKN09QNzJCVDNNR0sxR0ZIWURXQy4u  

Once you have submitted the form, we will be back in touch within one business day.  

Talk soon,  
Legal Team
